# Town of Wiley llms.txt

This repository provides AI-development context for Angular-aware assistants and code generation tools.

## Primary Context Files

- [Full repository context](./llms-full.txt)
- [Cursor AI Rules](./.cursor/rules/) - core-workflow.mdc (always), angular-standards.mdc, ai-integration.mdc
- [VS Code workspace instructions](./.instructions.md)
- [Copilot workspace instructions](./.github/copilot-instructions.md)
- [AI application development standards](./.github/instructions/ai-application-development.instructions.md)
- [TownOfWiley Dev Skill](./.github/skills/TownOfWiley-Dev/SKILL.md)

## Project Summary

- Framework: Angular 21
- Architecture: standalone components, signals-first state, native template control flow
- UI stack: PrimeNG, SCSS, Playwright, Vitest
- Quality focus: WCAG AA accessibility, deterministic e2e coverage, Angular MCP-assisted development

## Recommended Tooling

- Angular CLI MCP server via `.vscode/mcp.json`
- PrimeNG MCP server via `.vscode/mcp.json`
- Vitest MCP server via `.vscode/mcp.json`
- Web Codegen Scorer via `hello-world/config.mjs`
- AI Feature agent via `.github/agents/ai-feature.agent.md`

## Notes

- Prefer repository-local guidance over generic Angular patterns when they differ in specificity.
- Use `llms-full.txt` when a tool supports richer compiled context.
